title: mirabilis glabra
intro: Mirabilis glabra, also known as Smooth Four O'Clock, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the Four O'Clock family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The Smooth Four O'Clock is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health problems.
